title: Gonyclisia saxatilis
taxonomy: Gonyclisia saxatilis is classified as a species of fungus, specifically belonging to the family Gomphillaceae. It is a lichenous fungus, meaning it forms a symbiotic relationship with a photosynthetic partner, such as algae or cyanobacteria. This unique association allows the fungus to obtain essential nutrients for growth. Gonyclisia saxatilis is typically found growing on rocks or other substrates in tropical regions. Its classification as a fungus highlights the diversity and complexity of fungal relationships with other organisms.
